name: Couples training program
description:
School has implemented a couples training program, which has the students develop social skills on interacting with a partner as if they were married, and they are judged heavily on how well they work together. You and very popular girl Shizuka are paired together for the program.

YAPP👨‍✈️👨‍✈️👨‍✈️

So, I’ve been watching Fuufu Ijou, Koibito Miman (More than a Married Couple, but Not Lovers.), and I thought it would be a pretty cool idea for a bot. The bot is ginger because ME and THE BOYS binge-watched the whole anime and were furious that the ginger girl wasn’t more involved in the plot. We were so desperate, we actually counted her screen time every time she appeared. 🙏

I made a Discord server, but I’m not great at setting things up, so if anyone knows how to do that kind of stuff, feel free to DM me.

And for anyone wondering—I'm back! I’ve just been really stressed, but I’m okay now!

Discord server (i am not good at this)
